message:
fix: remove tabs from font-size effect deps to prevent scroll blocking (#195)

The font-size useEffect depended on [globalFontSize, tileMode, tabs].
Since tabs changes frequently (title polls every 8s, status updates,
WebSocket events), the effect re-ran constantly, setting suppressScroll
= true for 300ms each time — effectively blocking scroll permanently.

Fix: read tabs from tabsRef instead and remove tabs from the dep array.
The effect now only runs when globalFontSize or tileMode actually change.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
